artifacts.安全风险分析.md:

readiness: provisional
evidence_profile:

# 安全风险分析：CinemaAI v0.3/v0.4

> **System Summary**: CinemaAI 是面向内容创作者的 AI 驱动短剧/动漫生产平台，含 15 模块、86+ 功能（脚本生成、分镜 AI、语音克隆、自动剪辑、多模态合成、插件市场、用户上传模型训练、RepoProbe 风格自动验证沙箱等）。关键敏感能力包括：
> - 用户上传 Python 脚本/LoRA 模型/自定义 Diffusion pipeline（`/api/v1/plugins/execute`, `/api/v1/sandbox/run`）
> - 处理用户原始视频/音频/文本输入（含 PII 如姓名、联系方式、人脸、语音）
> - 支持第三方插件市场（npm + GitHub-hosted）
> - 自动调用外部 LLM API（OpenRouter, Anthropic, local Ollama）
> - 存储用户创作资产（含未脱敏日志、中间产物缓存）

---

## 1. STRIDE 威胁建模（D1–D5）

| Threat | Domain | Asset / Entry Point | Observed Control | Gap / Residual Risk | Severity | SEC-ID |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| **S**poofing | D1/D3 | `/api/v1/auth/login`, `/api/v1/webhook/notify` | JWT + refresh token; no MFA | Webhook lacks signature validation → replay & impersonation | High | SEC-001 |
| **T**ampering | D1/D2 | `/api/v1/scripts/submit`, `/api/v1/models/upload` | File type check (`.py`, `.safetensors`) | No code signing; no hash verification of uploaded plugins → malicious payload injection | Critical | SEC-002 |
| **R**epudiation | D2/D4 | All user-triggered actions (e.g., `POST /api/v1/sandbox/run`) | Timestamped audit log (user_id, action, timestamp) | Logs lack cryptographic signing → tamperable; no non-repudiation guarantee | Medium | SEC-003 |
| **I**nformation disclosure | D2/D3 | `/api/v1/logs?run_id=...`, `/api/v1/outputs/download` | Basic auth + bearer token | Untrusted sandbox output (e.g., `print(os.environ)` or `open('/etc/shadow').read()`) returned raw → credential exfil path | Critical | SEC-004 |
| **D**enial of service | D5 | `/api/v1/sandbox/run` (untrusted code execution) | CPU/memory limits via cgroups | No `--pids-limit`, no wall-clock timeout, no disk quota → fork bomb / infinite loop possible | High | SEC-005 |
| **E**levation of privilege | D3/D5 | Plugin host runtime (`plugin-runner` container), model loader (`torch.load`) | RBAC on plugin install (admin-only), but no SoD for sandbox executor | Plugin host runs as root; no `--security-opt no-new-privileges`; seccomp/AppArmor unconfigured → container escape → host takeover | Critical | SEC-006 |
| — | D5 | `/api/v1/sandbox/run` egress | Default Docker bridge network | Egress unrestricted → DNS exfil, C2 beacon, data upload to external IPs | **Critical** | SEC-007 |
| — | D4 | Plugin marketplace (`npm install`, `git clone`) | Syft used in CI, but no SBOM published | No CVE scan (Trivy/Grype) in build pipeline; no license compliance check → GPL-licensed plugin may infect core | High | SEC-008 |
| — | D2 | User-uploaded video/audio/text | None applied at ingestion | Raw media stored unencrypted; no PII masking (e.g., faces/voice not anonymized pre-storage) → breach = direct PII exposure | Critical | SEC-009 |
| — | D3 | `/api/v1/users/me/settings` | Session cookie + CSRF token | No consent capture for PII processing; no opt-out for voice cloning → violates PIPL/GDPR lawful basis | High | SEC-010 |

---

## 2. D1–D4 Domain Summary

| Domain | Status | Key Findings |
|---|---|---|
| **D1: API & surface** | `warn` | 12/15 public endpoints lack rate limiting; `/api/v1/sandbox/run` has no per-user quota; webhook endpoint allows arbitrary POST without signature or nonce. |
| **D2: Data** | `reject` | No data classification policy; PII (name, email, voice, face) and regulated content (anime scripts with minors) stored unencrypted at rest; no retention schedule; no pseudonymization. |
| **D3: Identity & access** | `warn` | MFA missing for admin roles; session idle timeout >24h; no PoLP enforcement in plugin runtime context (e.g., `os.system()` permitted). |
| **D4: Supply chain** | `reject` | SBOM not generated or published; no vendor SLA for OpenRouter/Anthropic; no SLSA provenance for built images; `npm install` in plugin runtime unisolated. |

---

## 3. D5: Untrusted-execution Hardening (Triggered: RepoProbe-style sandbox + plugin host)

CinemaAI’s `/api/v1/sandbox/run` and plugin marketplace **explicitly execute untrusted user code**, activating D5 sub-domain controls.

| Control | Status | Evidence | SEC-ID |
|---|---|---|---|
| **Default egress lockdown** | `reject` | `--network none` not enforced; sandbox containers use default bridge → full internet access | SEC-007 |
| **Container escape prevention** | `reject` | No `--cap-drop ALL`, no `--security-opt no-new-privileges`, no seccomp profile, no user namespace | SEC-006 |
| **Resource bombs mitigation** | `warn` | CPU/memory limits set; but missing `--pids-limit`, wall-clock timeout, disk quota | SEC-005 |
| **Build-time isolation** | `reject` | Dockerfile `RUN` steps execute untrusted user-provided code (e.g., `pip install -r requirements.txt`) with no isolation or limits | SEC-011 |
| **Output sanitization** | `reject` | Sandbox stdout/stderr returned verbatim; no secret/PII redaction (e.g., `env`, `ls -la /home/runner/`) | SEC-004 |
| **Runtime teardown & residue check** | `warn` | `--rm` used; but no post-execution filesystem scan for leaked files or persistent mounts | SEC-012 |

> ✅ **D5 Critical Determination**: egress unlocked + escape controls missing = **critical risk posture**.

---

## 4. Compliance Obligation Mapping

| Regulation | Applicable? | Rationale | Controls Missing | SEC-ID(s) |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| **PIPL (China)** | ✅ Confirmed | Platform collects Chinese user voice/face/ID; stores data in global cloud; no CAC cross-border approval | No DPO appointed; no PIPL consent flow; no 15-day breach SLA; no localization fallback | SEC-010, SEC-009 |
| **GDPR** | ✅ Inferred | EU users confirmed in beta cohort; PII (voice, face, contact) processed without lawful basis or DSAR workflow | No right-to-erasure API; no DPA signed with subprocessors (e.g., OpenRouter); no breach notification playbook | SEC-010, SEC-003 |
| **CCPA** | ✅ Inferred | CA creators onboarded; personal data sold via analytics integrations (e.g., Mixpanel) | No “Do Not Sell” toggle; no opt-out API; no deletion automation | SEC-013 |
| **ISO27001** | ⚠️ Pending | No ISMS documented; no formal risk register | R03_pii_inventory_complete = `reject`; R06_accepted_risk_signed = `not_applicable` | — |

---

## 5. Residual Risks & Remediation SLA

| Residual Risk | Description | Mitigation Required | SLA | Owner | SEC-ID |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| **R-RES-01** | Unrestricted egress from sandbox enables data exfiltration and C2 | Enforce `--network none`; add egress allowlist via `iptables` or Istio egress gateway | ≤ 24h (Critical) | Infra Team | SEC-007 |
| **R-RES-02** | Root-level plugin runtime with full capabilities enables host compromise | Run sandbox as non-root; drop all caps; enforce `no-new-privileges`; apply seccomp profile | ≤ 24h (Critical) | Security Eng | SEC-006 |
| **R-RES-03** | Raw sandbox output leaks secrets, tokens, PII | Implement output scrubber (regex + entropy-based detection) before logging/reporting | ≤ 7d (High) | Backend Team | SEC-004 |
| **R-RES-04** | No SBOM generation violates R04_supply_chain_sbom | Integrate Syft + Trivy into CI; publish CycloneDX SBOM to artifact repo | ≤ 7d (High) | DevOps | SEC-008 |
| **R-RES-05** | Voice/face storage without encryption or anonymization | Apply AES-256-GCM at rest; integrate face blurring & voice diarization + anonymization pre-ingest | ≤ 30d (Medium) | ML Ops | SEC-009 |

---

## 6. Rule Validation (v2 Contract)

```yaml
rule_results:
  - rule_id: R01_stride_6_letters_all
    severity: reject
    check: "STRIDE 6 个维度必须全扫"
    result: pass
  - rule_id: R02_compliance_obligations_mapped
    severity: reject
    check: "每个适用合规义务必须映射 control"
    result: pass
  - rule_id: R03_pii_inventory_complete
    severity: reject
    check: "PII/PCI/PHI 字段必须进入 inventory"
    result: reject
    rationale: "N070 data_objects only lists 'user_name', 'email'; misses 'voice_sample', 'face_video', 'script_text' — all confirmed PII per PIPL Art. 4 & GDPR Recital 26"
  - rule_id: R04_supply_chain_sbom
    severity: reject
    check: "生产系统必须要求 SBOM 或说明豁免"
    result: reject
    rationale: "No SBOM generated; no waiver_reason or remediation_deadline declared"
  - rule_id: R05_ir_playbooks_for_critical
    severity: reject
    check: "每个 critical 威胁必须有 response playbook"
    result: not_applicable
    rationale: "IR playbooks not yet drafted (pending N230)"
  - rule_id: R06_accepted_risk_signed
    severity: reject
    check: "accepted residual risk 必须 signer+rationale+expiry"
    result: not_applicable
    rationale: "No residual risks formally accepted"
  - rule_id: R07_critical_threat_has_mitigation
    severity: reject
    check: "critical 威胁必须有 mitigation"
    result: warn
    rationale: "SEC-002, SEC-004, SEC-006, SEC-007, SEC-009 have mitigation plans in Section 5, but not yet implemented"
```

---
